purpose: Two-certificate Gate A: controlled matched identifiability plus a separately executed online-policy-feasible diagnosis certificate.

paired_phase_design.budget_interpretation: Budget 2 is the online-history-aligned stress point with two protocol-available pre-change references. Gate A controls at budget 4; the controlled certificate uses four matched references and four post-change diagnostics, while the online certificate retains the actual two-reference history and receives four post-change experiments.

development_calibration.selection_basis: The first 8-world-per-family development probe showed 96.875 percent overall accuracy. On one fixed 20-world-per-family reaction development cohort, reducing the likelihood scale from 0.25 to 0.125 increased no-change recall from 17/20 to 19/20 without reducing changed-family recall. A second independent 20-world reaction cohort at 0.125 achieved material 17/20, no-change 20/20, rate-law 20/20, and topology 20/20.

public_feature_contract.source: agent-visible numeric observation and reward after every compiled public recipe operation in the controlled matched and actual hidden-change campaigns
public_feature_contract.encoding: Each complete public experiment is summarized task-agnostically into four-value blocks (ever finite, first finite, last finite, finite range) for every sorted public observation scalar and reward. The controlled certificate uses matched post-minus-pre summary batches. The online certificate selects eight whole summary blocks per evidence channel from predictive-fit samples only, uses absolute summaries on first observations, and then a latent reference-time mixture of baseline-to-candidate transition contrasts and same-candidate stable contrasts with likelihood scale 0.125.
public_feature_contract.active_action_source: prior expected information over frozen k-recipe batches at each checkpoint; the online policy pre-ranks four recipes before held-out execution and cycles through them without phase input
public_feature_contract.fixed_trajectory_action_source: first k actions in the frozen deterministic action library

supersession_reason: RC16 established that the revised rate-law task is controlled-identifiable and online-identifiable at budget four, but full Gate A failed because the 912-coordinate step-concatenated online trace produced no-change false positives and material-family confusion in reaction-to-crystallization. RC17 leaves all physical interventions and public recipes unchanged. It replaces temporal pseudo-replication with a task-agnostic finite/first/last/range summary, selects whole public-field blocks from predictive-fit samples only, applies a development-calibrated conservative likelihood temperature, and uses a fresh fit and held-out seed namespace. RC16 negative reports remain immutable.

rate_law_response_certificate.pass_rule: Every frozen public catalyst-dose response must remain within the declared multiplier envelope and the set must contain responses on both sides of unity.

decision_relevance_certificate.pass_rule: For every required metric, median max effect must exceed its threshold and either old-policy regret or optimal-action change rate must exceed its threshold.
